name_en: Code: 666703, New MCM Toni Visetos Shopping Bag New Look, Super Beautiful 👗 This small shopping bag is versatile and timeless. Don't be fooled by the size of this mini shopping bag; it features spacious compartments both inside and out to store all your small essentials. The cotton canvas lining features a street fashion-inspired print, subtly preserving MCM's adventurous aesthetic spirit. With the included crossbody strap, it offers hands-free functionality and better portability. No ❤️ charm Size: 18.5x19x9.5cm Bag opening width: 26cm Removable adjustable shoulder strap Zipper closure External back slit pocket Internal zip pocket Internal open pocket Leather trim Nappa leather trim Metal-tone hardware Fabric lining External D-ring decoration
